contract_summary: This is a creation wrapper (set) that allocates a new nfs4_clnt_odstate object, initializes its reference count to 1, and returns it to the caller. The caller acquires ownership of a reference and must eventually release it by calling a corresponding put function (e.g., nfs4_put_clnt_odstate). If allocation fails, NULL is returned; the caller must check for NULL and handle the error appropriately. No special locking or RCU requirements are introduced by this wrapper.
